personalInfo.name: Charles Yeh
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.tagline: Building modern web experiences with React, TypeScript, and a passion for clean code

about:
I'm a Software Engineer with a Master's degree in Information Technology from Monash University. With over 6 years of experience spanning web development, project management, and data analysis, I bring a unique blend of technical expertise and business acumen to every project.

I specialize in building modern, scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and cloud technologies. My approach combines strong problem-solving skills with a focus on user experience and clean, maintainable code.

I'm passionate about transforming complex requirements into elegant solutions and continuously expanding my skills to stay at the forefront of web development.

achievements: Built scalable onboarding features using React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Apollo Client, and styled-components across Onboarding V2, UK Expansion, and cohort-based onboarding experiences.
Delivered 10+ shared onboarding pages across multiple entity types, improving consistency and reducing duplicated implementation across onboarding journeys.
Refactored onboarding routes, checkpoints, and layouts, consolidating 4 layout components into 1 unified system to improve maintainability and UX consistency.
Designed a dynamic translation strategy based on domicile and entity type, enabling one onboarding architecture to support both AU and UK markets.
Leading Zeller Health Onboarding by evolving the theme architecture toward a token-based design system, creating a dedicated Health theme, and implementing cohort-specific onboarding logic.
Led the Zeller for Startups blog migration from Next.js and Tailwind into the React and TypeScript Merchant Portal, using Shadow DOM to isolate styles and prevent design-system conflicts.
Built and deployed 30+ AWS-based microservices using S3, SES, SNS, SQS, DynamoDB, Aurora, Cognito, and Secrets Manager, improving system scalability and operational efficiency.
Integrated third-party services including CoreLogic, Lextech, Illion, and DocuSign to support property data, credit checks, identity verification, and digital contract workflows.
Delivered customer-facing lending features using React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Material UI, including loan statements, repayments, contracts, delinquency management, and API pagination.
Introduced Redux Toolkit and standardized frontend state management, reducing frontend bugs and redundant API calls across lending workflows.
Strengthened core banking services by improving architecture, validation, access control, JWT authentication, and OTP verification.
Created OpenAPI 3.0 documentation in Confluence and led backend engineers through solution design, code reviews, and workflow improvements.
Built and maintained multi-lingual websites for Taiwan-Japan exchange platform
Implemented responsive designs and optimized performance for diverse user bases
Collaborated directly with clients to translate requirements into technical solutions
Partnered with Delta Electronics on Government intelligent street lamp system in Taoyuan city
Provided pre-sales and after-sales technical support including problem solving and training
Conducted failure analysis on Microchip ICs using C programming and oscilloscope
Assisted students with disabilities in completing IT certification courses
Provided guidance on various computer technician certifications
Developed accessible learning materials for online courses

education.institution: California State University of Monterey Bay
education.award: International exchange scholarship from Ministry of Education, Taiwan

projects.title: WillUp Mission Alarm App
projects.caption: Mission-based alarm app designed to help users build stronger morning discipline
projects.description: A cross-platform mobile alarm app built with Flutter and Dart. WillUp requires users to complete wake-up missions such as mirror selfies, shake challenges, and voice affirmations before dismissing alarms. The app includes reusable mission architecture, Sleep and Focus modes, strict-mode behaviour, white-noise playback, and configurable validation flows.

projects.title: YumYum Recipe Finder
projects.caption: Full-stack MERN application for discovering and saving recipes
projects.description: A modern recipe finder with full authentication, CRUD operations for user-created recipes, and integration with Spoonacular API. Built with React, Redux Toolkit, Express, and MongoDB.

projects.title: GitHub Finder
projects.caption: Search and explore GitHub users and their repositories
projects.description: A React application utilizing the GitHub REST API to search users and display their profiles and repositories. Features Context API for state management and Tailwind CSS with daisyUI for styling.

projects.title: House Marketplace
projects.caption: Real estate listing platform with geolocation features
projects.description: A Firebase-powered marketplace for buying and selling properties. Features full CRUD functionality, Google Maps integration for property locations, and user authentication.

projects.title: Skindicator-X
projects.caption: AI-powered skin health awareness platform
projects.description: A health-focused web application providing skin cancer awareness and AI-based analysis. Users can upload skin images for preliminary assessment and find nearby dermatologists.

projects.title: Support Desk
projects.caption: Customer support ticket management system
projects.description: Full-stack MERN application for managing support tickets. Features JWT authentication, Redux state management, and full CRUD operations for ticket management.

projects.title: Australia Housing Analysis
projects.caption: Interactive data visualization of Australian housing trends
projects.description: A narrative visualization website exploring average housing prices in Australia, focusing on population impact and university locations. Built with D3.js featuring choropleth maps and animated bar charts.

projects.title: Pain Diary
projects.caption: Mobile health tracking application for pain management
projects.description: An Android application enabling users to track pain experiences with intensity levels, locations, and environmental factors. Features daily/weekly/monthly reports and weather API integration.

projects.title: Tag Tag
projects.caption: Cloud-based image storage with AI object detection
projects.description: AWS serverless solution utilizing S3, Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB for automated image tagging. Features YOLO-based object detection for uploaded images.
